title: Image returns a black canvas in API template
symptom: When using an image in an API template, the output is a black canvas instead of the expected image.
not_this_if: Image is correctly displayed when using a URL string
root_cause: The API template may not support sending images in binary format, leading to a black canvas output. Instead, it requires images to be provided as a URL or in base64 format.
fix_steps: Convert the image to base64 format
Update the API template to use the base64 string instead of the binary image
Test the API call again to verify the image displays correctly
agent_instruction: Convert the image to base64 and update the API template accordingly.
